nasb.text: And he said to them, “Is it well with him?” And they said, “It is well, and here is Rachel his daughter coming with the sheep.”

esv.text: He said to them, “Is it well with him?” They said, “It is well; and see, Rachel his daughter is coming with the sheep!”

cnv.text: 雅各又問他們：“他平安嗎？”他們回答：“平安。你看，他的女兒拉結領著羊群來了。”

ccb.text: 雅各又问：“他好吗？”他们回答说：“很好。你看，他的女儿拉结带着羊群来了。”

csbs.text: 雅各接着问他们：“他平安吗？” 他们说：“平安。看哪，他女儿瑞秋与羊群一同来了！”
